# Launchpad

> Launchpad is a platform that builds and deploys full-stack web apps from a single prompt. Powered by Claude Code and a shared quality checklist (CLAUDE.md), each app gets a unique design, full SEO, analytics, Firebase backend, and Netlify deployment — all automated.

## Pages

- [Home](https://launchpad-console.netlify.app/): Gallery of all apps built on the Launchpad platform, with live URLs and descriptions.
- [Console](https://launchpad-console.netlify.app/console): Invite-gated builder interface. Enter a prompt describing an app and get a deployed URL in 5-15 minutes.

## How It Works

1. Enter an invite code to access the builder console.
2. Describe the app you want in plain English — design, features, data sources.
3. Claude Code reads the CLAUDE.md quality checklist and builds the entire app: Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind + shadcn/ui + Firebase + Netlify.
4. The app is deployed to Netlify with a live URL, complete with SEO, analytics, security headers, and a custom design.

## Apps Built on Launchpad

- **MeepleMatch**: Board game discovery with swipe-based voting and Amazon affiliate links.
- **Black Diamond Alpine Wash**: Exterior cleaning company site with quote request form for Whitefish, Montana.

## Tech Stack

Every Launchpad app uses: Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui, Firebase/Firestore, Netlify, PostHog analytics, and Claude Code for generation.
